content: Hey, I just finished reading 'Ready Player Two' and I have some thoughts. Have you read it?
I haven't read it yet, but I loved the first book! What did you think of the sequel?
Honestly? I was disappointed. It felt like it was trying too hard to recapture the magic of the first one. But I'm probably biased since I grew up gaming.
Interesting! What kind of gaming do you do now? Still into retro stuff?
Mostly streaming these days. I do a lot of speedrunning for charity events. Just beat Super Mario World in under 20 minutes last week.
Wow, that's impressive! How long have you been speedrunning?
About 5 years now. Started when I was in college. It's a great way to connect with the gaming community and raise money for good causes.
That's awesome. Do you have a regular streaming schedule?
Yeah, I stream Tuesday through Thursday evenings. It's tough balancing with family life though. My wife is super supportive but with two kids...
I can imagine! How old are your kids?
Emma is 6 and Liam is 3. They're both into gaming already, which is adorable but also terrifying as a parent.
That's so cute! What kind of games do they play?
Mostly educational stuff and Mario Kart. Emma's actually getting pretty good at Tetris. I'm so proud.
That's amazing! Do you play games as a family?
We do game nights on weekends. Last weekend we played Overcooked and it was chaos but so fun. I need those moments to unwind.
Sounds like a blast! What else do you do to relax when you're not gaming or streaming?
